plugin.name: acme-launch
plugin.description: Everything the Acme launch team does — briefs, plans, releases, retros.

skills.title: Launch Brief
skills.summary: Draft the canonical 5-section launch brief from a kickoff conversation or notes.
success: Output has exactly the 5 canonical sections in order: Goal, Audience, Message, Channels, Risks
Every open input gap is asked via the interview skill, not invented
Brief is written into templates/Launch-Brief.docx, not a loose markdown file

skills.title: Press Release
skills.summary: Write a press release in Acme house style with required boilerplate and approval chain.
success: Includes the required Acme boilerplate paragraph verbatim
Headline is under 12 words and names the product
Ends with the approval-chain block listing Comms and Legal sign-off

skills.title: Launch Checklist
skills.summary: Run the T-minus launch checklist: owners, gates, go/no-go, day-of comms.
success: Every checklist item gets a named owner before the go/no-go step
Go/no-go is asked explicitly and the decision is recorded in the output

skills.title: Interview
skills.summary: Reusable elicitation: ask the user structured questions to fill gaps in any artifact.
skills.notes: Composed by launch-brief and retro for missing inputs.
success: One question at a time, most important first, with a likely default offered
Skipped fields recorded as [CONFIRM], never guessed

skills.title: Metrics Report
skills.summary: Pull launch metrics from the analytics MCP and produce the wrap report.
success: Metrics pulled from the analytics MCP, never estimated or recalled
Wrap report sections match the team template verbatim

skills.title: Retro
skills.summary: Facilitate and write up the launch retro using the team's template.
success: Retro written into the bundled template, headings verbatim
Every action item names an owner
Missing inputs elicited via the interview skill, not invented

commands.name: launch
commands.summary: Router: show where this launch stands and what to run next.

commands.name: launch-wrap
commands.summary: Run the Wrap phase end to end.

agents.name: brand-review
agents.summary: Adversarial reviewer for Acme voice and brand rules.

integrations.name: analytics
integrations.authNotes: Team API token; each user signs in on first use.

hooks.purpose: Lint any edited launch brief against the canonical section headings before it can ship.
